mapper.sql: id, name, description, subject, invitation_code, creator_id, class_ids, created_at, updated_at, members, is_deleted, is_published, rag_enabled, rag_knowledge_id, rag_document_count, rag_dataset_id, sync_to_rag_flow, rag_sync_status, last_sync_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_base ( id, name, description, subject, invitation_code, creator_id, class_ids, created_at, updated_at, members, is_deleted, is_published, rag_enabled, rag_knowledge_id, rag_document_count, rag_dataset_id, sync_to_rag_flow, rag_sync_status, last_sync_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{subject}, #{invitationCode}, #{creatorId}, #{classIds,typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{members,typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, #{isDeleted}, #{isPublished}, #{ragEnabled}, #{ragKnowledgeId}, #{ragDocumentCount}, #{ragDatasetId}, #{syncToRagFlow}, #{ragSyncStatus}, #{lastSyncTime} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM knowledge_base WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(members, CAST(#{memberId} AS JSON), '$') AND rag_enabled = #{ragEnabled} AND is_deleted = #{isDeleted}

SELECT
FROM knowledge_base WHERE class_ids IS NOT NULL AND JSON_CONTAINS(class_ids, CAST(#{classId} AS JSON), '$') AND is_deleted = false

SELECT
FROM knowledge_base WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND is_deleted = false
